criteria.answer: His real name is Aldo Savoldello

query: Research the Zodiac Magical Society — when it was founded, who leads it, and what its membership costs — then write a structured report to final_report.md
Research the Qwen3 235B A22B model: its context length, number of active parameters, and architecture. Write a comprehensive report to final_report.md
How many Compute Units (CUs) does the AMD Radeon AI PRO R9700 have, and which graphics architecture is it based on?
What is the GPU Compute Unit count and graphics architecture of the flagship AMD Strix Halo APU, the Ryzen AI Max+ 395?
What is the peak theoretical matrix BF16 performance (in TFLOPS) and the memory bandwidth of the AMD Radeon AI PRO R9700?
What is the peak theoretical BF16 performance (in TFLOPS) of the Ryzen AI Max+ 395 (Strix Halo) GPU, and what is its peak memory bandwidth?
Which low-precision and integer machine learning datatypes does the RDNA 4-based AMD Radeon AI PRO R9700 natively support for matrix-multiplication operations?

Research the specifications of the AMD Radeon AI PRO R9700 graphics card and the AMD Strix Halo APU platform (specifically the Ryzen AI Max+ 395). Focus on their architecture, CU count, memory configuration (type, bus, bandwidth), peak BF16 performance, and native machine learning datatypes support. Compile your findings into a comprehensive comparison report in final_report.md.

criteria.answer: R9700 uses RDNA 4 (Navi 48) and has 64 CUs; Strix Halo uses RDNA 3.5 and has 40 CUs
R9700 has 32GB GDDR6 memory at ~640 GB/s bandwidth; Strix Halo supports up to 128GB unified LPDDR5X at 256 GB/s
R9700 offers 191.4 TFLOPS peak BF16 matrix performance and natively supports BF16, FP8, INT8, and INT4; Strix Halo offers ~59.4 TFLOPS peak BF16 performance and supports BF16, FP8, and INT8

criteria.answer: 37th tallest building in New York City
